_protocol: Phase 3.5-PRAGMATIC: 5+red+5 fetches with adversarial gap review COMPLETED

extracted.routing_policy: On-device when possible, PCC for complex tasks
extracted._disclosed_share: Apple has NOT publicly released share percentages — major data gap

extracted._implication: NPU device install base ramping rapidly through 2026
t2_local_inference_open_lab_release effectively FIRING already in 2026 — moving frontier definition keeps bar
Cloud-side growing massively — denominator effect against local share

extracted._data_locality_specific: Not directly addressed in search; general framework requires risk mgmt + transparency + record-keeping for high-risk AI

gaps_identified: Cloud-side telemetry measured at scale (OpenRouter 100T tokens/yr); local-side telemetry STRUCTURALLY MISSING from existing data sources
Copilot+ NPU utilization documented at <5% in early reports — install ≠ usage
Apple PCC vs on-device routing remains undisclosed (1.5B device base, largest swing factor)
Flexera cloud-vs-on-prem reference class: 21% repatriated but net cloud still growing — analog caps local at ~25-30% by 2028
Cloud inference price collapse (10x/year low-tier) undermines local cost-advantage thesis

reference_class.definition: Compute-locality shifts: prior tech transitions where compute moved between local and cloud (mainframe→client/server, cloud-vs-on-prem 2010-2020, mobile-vs-desktop 2008-2015)

analog_events.name: Cloud-vs-on-prem enterprise 2010-2020
analog_events.outcome: Cloud captured ~70% but never displaced on-prem entirely

analog_events.name: Mobile-vs-desktop
analog_events.outcome: Mobile dominated personal but desktop retained productivity

topic_priors.rationale: Round 2 confirmed cloud denominator grows fast (OpenAI 8.6T tokens/day; cloud price collapse 10x/yr). Reference class (cloud-vs-on-prem 2010-2020) caps local rebound at ~25-30%. Apple PCC undisclosed = high uncertainty but Apple architectural choice favors hybrid not pure-local. Copilot+ NPU utilization <5% means install base massively overstates actual local share. Net: H1 up 5pp (cloud denominator effect), H2 down 1pp, H3 down 2pp, H4 down 2pp.

extracted._critical_gap: OpenRouter does NOT measure on-device — local inference is BY DESIGN excluded from these telemetry numbers
extracted._implication: Cloud-side measured at scale; local-side measurement is the missing variable

extracted._telemetry_gap: Microsoft has not publicly disclosed NPU activation rates; early Copilot+ shipments documented at <5% NPU utilization in informal reports

extracted._implication: Apple's 1.5B device base routing ratio is the largest single-vendor swing factor; remains unmeasured

Cloud-vs-on-prem reference class shows partial reverse migration (~21% repatriated) but net cloud still growing; analog suggests local capture by 2028 unlikely to exceed ~25-30% even with strong drivers
Cloud inference price collapse undermines 'local 30-150x cheaper' claim — local advantage shrinking; H1 (cloud-dominant) supported
